title: Why Self-Knowledge Matters
body:
Self-knowledge matters because people live inside their own patterns. If you cannot see what triggers you, motivates you, or drains you, the same problems repeat in different outfits.

Knowing yourself better helps you choose better work, better relationships, and better routines. It also makes it easier to ask for the right kind of help.

The practical result is fewer self-inflicted mistakes and a stronger ability to course-correct early instead of late.
keyPoints: Patterns repeat when they are not seen
Awareness often matters more than willpower
furtherReading: The Road Less Travelled by M. Scott Peck
The Examined Life by Stephen Grosz
